name: USS SC-1318 (SC-1318)
events: 17 Aug 1945 Around 0230 K/17, USS Dragonet (T/Lt.Cdr G.G. Hinman, USN) and USS Entemedor (T/Cdr. W.R. Smith, Jr., USN) made rendezvous.
Around 0600 K/17, they were joined by the escort to Saipan, USS SC-1318 (Lt.(jg) E.L. Campbell, USNR).
They arrived at Saipan around 1130 K/17.
